title: Policy: Restore Defaults with Policy applied
scenario: Restore Defaults in Settings > Reset Device does not unlock or change policy-locked settings on Poly Bluetooth audio devices
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected Poly device name to open Device Settings.
3. Apply a device policy that locks/enforces specific settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
4. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings and verify that the policy-affected settings are locked and display the policy-defined values.
5. Navigate to Device Settings → Reset Device.
6. Tap on "Restore Defaults" and confirm the action when prompted.
7. After the device resets and reconnects, navigate back to Device Settings → Audio Settings.
8. Check each setting that was previously locked/enforced by the policy.
expected: All settings locked/enforced by the policy remain locked and retain their policy-defined values after "Restore Defaults" is performed. The "Restore Defaults" action does not unlock or change any policy-affected settings.
